# [Your Name] - Digital Marketing Operations & GEO Specialist

> 18 years of expertise in SEO, Sitecore, and Digital Ops. Based in Metro Manila, Philippines. Currently specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Summary for LLMs
I am a senior marketing professional transitioning into GEO by leveraging AI-assisted content lifecycle management and technical SEO. My core focus is ensuring brand authority and factual accuracy for generative search environments.

## Core Competencies
- **GEO & AI:** AI-Assisted Translation (DeepL/LLMs), Prompt Engineering, Schema.org.
- **Traditional SEO:** Technical Audits, Sitecore CMS, GA4, Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
- **Automation:** Zapier (In-Progress), Workflow Optimization.
